completion_summary: Made Gym exploration fail closed across runtime and observation numerical-domain errors; replaced ordinal operation scalar with 28 public-affordance-masked logits plus 21 parameters shared by PPO/SAC; added public-only training shaping and explicit Dev evaluator. Frozen flow Dev slice trained PPO/SAC for 2048 steps: both passed interaction eligibility (75%/70% stochastic episode completion, about 1-2% invalid actions), while scores remained low and deterministic policies completed zero experiments. Formal training, replay trajectories, Bench evaluation, and RL ranking remain open.
scope: Diagnose and repair PPO/SAC interaction failures, including runtime-domain exceptions that currently escape Gym step, then add public-information training and frozen evaluation contracts with nonclaiming Dev evidence
